No jargon dump found (no paragraph introduces 3+ new terms simultaneously — each sub-section introduces one concept). Sentences are short and active-voice. No hedging phrases detected. 'LLM' is used without re-spelling 'Large Language Model' — acceptable at Week 13, Topic 9; the term was introduced in earlier sequence topics and the artifact-mix audience rule permits reuse of prior-defined terms without re-definition.
